mapper.select: SELECT order_id AS orderId, product_id AS productId, order_qty AS orderQty, order_date AS orderDate, client_id AS clientId, order_status AS orderStatus, lot_no AS lotNo, remark AS remark, reg_date AS regDate, upd_date AS updDate FROM product_order ORDER BY order_date DESC

SELECT product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, unit_price AS unitPrice, unit, min_order_qty AS minOrderQty, storage_method AS storageMethod, expiration_type AS expirationType, recipe_code AS recipeCode, product_status AS productStatus, reg_date AS regDate, upd_date AS updDate FROM product where product_status = '생산' ORDER BY product_id
